# Intorza - Best Interior Designers in Bangalore

> Intorza is Bangalore's leading interior design company specializing in modular kitchens, wardrobes, and complete home interiors. 500+ projects completed with 10-year warranty. Serving all major Bangalore localities.

## Company Overview
- Founded: 2014
- Location: HBR Layout, Bangalore 560045, Karnataka, India
- Phone: +91-9886579923
- Email: intorza.com@gmail.com
- Website: https://intorza.com

## Why Choose Intorza
- 500+ completed projects across Bangalore
- 10-year warranty on all work
- 45-90 day project completion
- In-house manufacturing facility
- Free consultation and 3D design
- Transparent pricing with no hidden costs
- Dedicated project manager for every project
- Premium materials from trusted brands

## Pricing Overview
- Modular Kitchen: Starting from ₹2.5 Lakhs
- 2 BHK Full Home: Starting from ₹8 Lakhs
- 3 BHK Full Home: Starting from ₹12 Lakhs
- Villa Interiors: Starting from ₹25 Lakhs
- Wardrobe: Starting from ₹1.2 Lakhs
- TV Unit: Starting from ₹40,000

## How It Works
1. Book a free consultation at https://intorza.com/contact or call +91-9886579923
2. Receive detailed 3D designs and transparent cost estimate within 5 working days
3. Approve designs and manufacturing begins at in-house facility
4. Professional installation with dedicated project manager (45-90 days)
5. Handover with 10-year warranty and after-sales support

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What is the cost of interior design in Bangalore?
A: Interior design costs in Bangalore vary by scope. 2BHK interiors start from ₹8 Lakhs, 3BHK from ₹12 Lakhs, and villas from ₹25 Lakhs. Modular kitchens start from ₹2.5 Lakhs. Contact Intorza for a free, detailed estimate.

Q: How long does interior design take?
A: Modular kitchen installation takes 15-20 days. Full home interiors for a 2BHK take 45-60 days, 3BHK takes 60-75 days, and villas take 75-90 days.

Q: Does Intorza offer a warranty?
A: Yes, Intorza provides a 10-year warranty on all interior work including modular kitchens, wardrobes, and all furniture.

Q: Which areas in Bangalore does Intorza serve?
A: Intorza serves all major Bangalore localities including Koramangala, Indiranagar, HSR Layout, Whitefield, Jayanagar, JP Nagar, Electronic City, Marathahalli, Sarjapur Road, Bellandur, Hebbal, and 10+ more areas.
